Video.summary: Suspicions of cheating and a claim for $695 have Jasmine and Gerrel seeking relationship advice.
Video.title: Doggett vs. Townsend

Video.summary: A paternity battle ignites as Janay seeks justice, while Dale's doubts and secrets keep him on the defensive.
Video.title: Smith vs. Anderson

Video.summary: Ricky sues his ex-girlfriend, Jada, saying she stole $800 of his child support money to buy tickets to a Beyoncé concert.
Video.title: Colbert vs. Adams

Video.summary: Past infidelity has a girlfriend and boyfriend at odds over the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Ogletree vs. Lockhart

Video.summary: After things go south while living together, exes Eric and Zaniya counter sue each other over money owed.
Video.title: Keeton vs. Barnett

Video.summary: Secret social accounts and suspicious behavior have Kashmir asking the Cutlers if this relationship can be saved.
Video.title: Thornton vs Jones

Video.summary: Alexus seeks vindication because hometown rumors have her boyfriend, Kristopher, questioning the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Davis-Jones vs. Martin

Video.summary: A Georgia couple seek advice from the judges after struggling with nitpicking, job loss and starting a family.
Video.title: King vs. McFee

Video.summary: Perrion and Steven didn't last as a couple but hope to make it as business partners; it may be time for a drug test.
Video.title: Roberts vs. Powell

Video.summary: Jerkmeeka issues Rodriquez an ultimatum after his longtime female friend begins interfering in their marriage.
Video.title: Tuggle-Wright vs. Tuggle

Video.summary: Accusations of betrayal threaten their future as Christopher and Michelle seek to determine the fate of their family and home.
Video.title: Gore vs. Sherman

Video.summary: After eight years together, Krystal's pregnancy sparks doubts about her fiancé's addictions and honesty, demanding clarity before marriage.
Video.title: Simmons vs. Stephens

Video.summary: Destiny and Tavian clash over trust, paternity and financial woes, seeking answers that could make or break their future.
Video.title: Murphy vs. Scott

Video.summary: Pye sues ex-boyfriend Santiel for the return of her safe keys, saying stole them post-breakup.
Video.title: Powell-Woods vs. Chambers

Video.summary: A woman confronts her long-lost father to uncover the truth about her paternity and reclaim her identity.
Video.title: Brown vs. Smith

Video.summary: Exes Caerya and James meet in court to settle a three-year debate over their son's paternity.
Video.title: Cox vs. Carswell

Video.summary: A broken cellphone after a heated argument has a Texas couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Oliver vs. Boyce

Video.summary: Terrell sues girlfriend Kristy for damages because he suspects she is using him for money.
Video.title: Marrow vs. Coleman

Video.summary: With help from a compatibility expert, the judges advise longtime couple Erica and Turk on family and finances.
Video.title: Virgil vs. Virgil Jr.

Video.summary: A grieving grandmother demands a paternity test to uncover the truth about her late son's mysterious child.
Video.title: Moultry vs. Portuonio

Video.summary: Former roommates and ex-lovers, Shelby and Natalie, settle a dispute over unpaid rent money.
Video.title: Hannan vs. Davila

Video.summary: Kenneth sues his wife, Monika, for $1,000 in property damage because she burned his clothes after he refused to clean up after himself.
Video.title: Burke vs. Burke

Video.summary: Breanna and Jonathan face a relationship crossroads, navigating trust, age gaps and uncertain futures in their complicated polyamorous love life.
Video.title: Minor vs. Sanders

Video.summary: After tolerating his gambling and smoking addictions for three-and-a-half years, Deja issues boyfriend Marcus an ultimatum.
Video.title: McKinny vs. Everett

Video.summary: Shocking results of a paternity test will make or break Josh and Shaneka's 10-year relationship.
Video.title: Kellam vs. Bigby

Video.summary: A father's doubt and a mother's plea collide in court over paternity, love and a baby's future.
Video.title: Willis vs. Hagans

Video.summary: First, the plaintiff is suing for the cost of a Yorkie! Then, a defendant failed to remit payment.
Video.title: New Yorkie

Video.summary: An uncooperative felon tests the patience of the SED.
Video.title: Special Enforcement Detail Work

Video.summary: Exes squabble in court over who’s to blame for their failed relationship.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Fletcher

Video.summary: In an emotional case of irreconcilable differences, J'Licia and Jose attempt to save their marriage.
Video.title: Hernandez vs. Hernandez

Video.summary: Terran delivers an ultimatum after he suspects girlfriend Nia of cheating based on her sexually explicit rap lyrics.
Video.title: Eaton vs. Henderson

Video.summary: With the help of an expert witness, the judges address the extravagant spending habits in Ayahna and Clarence's marriage.
Video.title: James vs. James

Video.summary: A polygraph test determines the fate of a rocky relationship when Bernard and Lexus both accuse the other of cheating.
Video.title: O'Neal vs Antrom

Video.summary: Since the birth of their child, Canandas denies being the father, so Charisma demands he take a paternity test.
Video.title: Paige vs Ware

Video.summary: A man says his girlfriend's actions don't match her words, which makes him suspect that she's cheating on him.
Video.title: Jackson vs. King

Video.summary: Imani and LaBron face a high-stakes compatibility test to determine if their love and family can survive.
Video.title: Gordon vs. Watson

Video.summary: The limits of polyamorous-turned-monogamous couple Ericka and Rashaad are tested when a surprise witness drops a bomb.
Video.title: Calhoun vs. Sowell

Video.summary: A polygraph test will determine if Deandre has been unfaithful to his girlfriend, Olivia.
Video.title: Shiel vs. Spraggins

Video.summary: The results of a double polygraph determine the future of newlyweds Sierra and Victor's marriage.
Video.title: Buckner vs. Banks

Video.summary: An exhausted mother gets a surprise after putting her dreams on hold for her family.
Video.title: Prince vs. Thornton

Video.summary: After years of ups and downs, the result of a DNA test will make or break a long-distance relationship.
Video.title: Webb vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Lomecia confronts Tee over infidelity, family interference and broken trust, demanding a lie detector test to save her marriage.
Video.title: Eason vs. Eason

Video.summary: A haunted doll and accusations of witchcraft have a formerly married couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Smith vs. Johnston

Video.summary: A Georgia woman suspects her longtime boyfriend of cheating because he has not yet proposed.
Video.title: Harris vs. Harris

Video.summary: John must answer for his severe smoking addiction after his girlfriend, Debbie, issues him an ultimatum.
Video.title: Goodman vs. McDonnell

Video.summary: International twerk coach Christopher brings ex-boyfriend Carl to court after they fail at mixing business and pleasure.
Video.title: Lewis vs. Nuckols

Video.summary: A boyfriend and girlfriend go head-to-head in court over a discarded promise ring and a broken camera.
Video.title: White vs. Mitchell

Video.summary: With help from a substance abuse expert, the judges coach Nohariz and Eli through marital issues and alcohol abuse.
Video.title: Gonzalez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: As retribution for his serial cheating, Jaylon sues boyfriend Brian for payment from their online video sharing channel profits.
Video.title: Davis vs. Alben

Video.summary: A surprise confession changes the course of Johnathan and McKenzie's budding relationship.
Video.title: Renneberg vs. Peterson

Video.summary: A paternity test will determine the fate of Keith and Rochelle's relationship after questions arise from her ex's family.
Video.title: Jordan vs. Dawson

Video.summary: A devastating revelation proves that love truly is blind in Sharise and Edson's relationship.
Video.title: Bowie vs. Segarra

Video.summary: Exes duke it out in court over the paternity of a child.
Video.title: Cornell vs. Pruitt

Video.summary: Thirteen years and 20 breakups later, Lakeia and Shundric leave the fate of their relationship up to a compatibility test.
Video.title: White vs. Loyd

Video.summary: Harmoni suspects Jarren is cheating and has demanded he take a polygraph to prove his fidelity.
Video.title: Lockhart vs Reid

Video.summary: Texas pair Joel and Erin go head to head in court to handle some unfinished business after their breakup.
Video.title: Whitaker vs. Estevez

Video.summary: Angela is prepared to call off her wedding if her fiancée, Juan, proves to have been unfaithful.
Video.title: Martinez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: After 10 years off and on, Darika eventually kicks Brandon out of the house; a polygraph determines whether he will be going home.
Video.title: Gist vs. Green

Video.summary: The mysterious disappearance of a prized Steelers jersey has Michelle and Ken's 23-year relationship on the line.
Video.title: Lozon vs. Lozon

Video.summary: After her boyfriend, Barry, takes a suspicious "business trip" to Miami, Brooke suspects him of cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Daniels vs. White

Video.summary: With help from a compatibility expert, the judges get to the bottom of Chino and Alyssa's relationship issues.
Video.title: Johnson-Smith vs. Johnson

Video.summary: Aspiring social media star Mike sues ex-girlfriend Sidney for nonpayment after she profited from an explicit adult video.
Video.title: Barham vs. Starr

Video.summary: Suspicions of cheating force Dawn to petition his girlfriend, Alexandra, to a polygraph to test her loyalty.
Video.title: Barnes vs. Edge

Video.summary: The Cutlers navigate a messy situationship when Ricardo brings Errollyn to court for a paternity test.
Video.title: Clarke vs. Smith

Video.summary: Mikeyah and Marcus have come before the judges to determine if they should stay or walk away.
Video.title: Grice vs Haynes

Video.summary: A rekindled love and broken trust collide as Larry evaluates his future with his ex-wife and their newborn son.
Video.title: Mayes vs. Lebron

Video.summary: Rachel must answer for delaying her nuptials to fiance Blaine after he stuck with her through her prison stint.
Video.title: Cerre vs. Hardy
